title: URGENEX 7.4V 2200mAh Lipo Battery 50C(Burst 80C) High Discharge Rate RC Batteries Deans T Plug with 1 to 2 USB Charger Fit for RC Car Truggy, RC Airplane, FPV Drone, UAV Quadcopter and Helicopter
features: ★50C High Discharge Rate: URGENEX 50C(Burst 80C) upgraded lipo battery offers you more power and this rechargeable pack is ready to deliver the power for you anytime, anywhere. URGENEX RC battery pack delivers a discharge rate to push your RC car/truck/drone run time to the peak of its abilities.

★Parameters: Material: Lithium Polymer; Battery Voltage: 7.4V; Configuration: 2S1P; Capacity: 2200mAh; Discharge Rate: 50C(Burst 80C); Connector: Deans T plug; Dimensions: 70*34*17mm/2.75*1.34*0.66in(L*W*H); Approx weight: 88.3g/3.11oz.
★Application: Fit for RC Car Truggy, RC Airplane, FPV Drone, UAV Quadcopter and Helicopter. (Only if the voltage (7.4v), dimension and the plug (Deans T Plug) match, then it will fit).
★Long cycle life: Our Advanced lipo battery with uniquely designed will recycle at least 500 times. URGENEX offers one year warranty and lifetime customer service.

★Convenient & Ultra Safe: Our high technology enables quick & constant charging in anytime, and no cell memory effect so that you do not need to full discharge before recharging. All of our RC batteries are available use in anytime. Choose URGENEX, Choose the power. Keeps your fun going longer.
★Warranty: URGENEX always insists customer first and offers one year warranty.
description: Product Description AB Clip Special Design Install the AB clips to your XH-3Pin connector of batteries which could protect the charging wires of batteries. Also they can help you plug and unplug the charging cable easier without damaging. Perfect Fit For Your RC Car Perfect fir for your RC Car, Truck, Boat, Radio Control Drones, FPV Racer, RC Helicopters, Planes, Cars and so on. What You Get Package will include 2PCS 2200mAh RC Lipo Batteries with Deans T plug, 1PCS 1to2 USB charger, user manual and exquisite box.
